select:
SELECT DISTINCT LINK_MAP_ID FROM RTM_LINK WHERE LINK_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT LINK_ID AS linkId, LINK_MAP_ID AS linkMapId, ST_ND_ID AS stNdId, ED_ND_ID AS edNdId FROM RTM_LINK WHERE LINK_MAP_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT n.NODE_ID AS nodeId, n.NODE_MAP_ID AS nodeMapId, n.NODE_KIND AS nodeKind, adj.ADJ_NODE_ID AS adjNodeId, adj.ADJ_NODE_MAP_ID AS adjNodeMapId FROM RTM_NODE n LEFT JOIN RTN_ADJ_NODE adj ON adj.NODE_ID = n.NODE_ID AND adj.NODE_MAP_ID = n.NODE_MAP_ID WHERE n.NODE_MAP_ID IN
#{id}
